name: Ivy
description: Quarter-round leaves tiling into winding vines — each leaf swells from a different corner after every redraw.

code.style: --leaf: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --corner: @p(100% 0 0 0, 0 100% 0 0, 0 0 100% 0, 0 0 0 100%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 96%; height: 96%; margin: 2%; background: var(--leaf); border-radius: var(--corner); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
